title: Tsela ya Lefa la Setso ho Pholletsa le Diprovense tsa Afrika Borwa
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 5 - Kgato e Bohareng
slides.title: Tsela ya Lefa la Setso ho Pholletsa le Diprovense tsa Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: A re tsamayeng ho pholletsa le diprovense tsohle tse robong mme re fumane dibaka tse khethehileng, dipale le meetlo e leng ya rona kaofela.

media.alt: Mmapa o mebala-bala wa moedi wa Afrika Borwa o nang le matheba a supang dibaka tsa lefa la setso ho pholletsa le naha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amohela baithuti mme o hlalose kgopolo ya 'tsela ya lefa la setso' - leeto le iqapetsweng le emang dibakeng tse khethehileng ho pholletsa le Afrika Borwa. Botsa: na ho na le motho ya kileng a etela musiamo, mohaho wa kgale, seemahale kapa sebaka sa tlhaho? Tsela ya lefa la setso e kopanya dibaka tsena. Qetellong ya thuto baithuti ba lokela ho kgona ho bolela mabitso a dibaka tsa lefa la setso diprovenseng tse fapaneng le ho bolela hore ke hobaneng re di sireletsa.

slides.title: Lefa la setso ke eng?
slides.lead: Lefa la setso ke ntho e nngwe le e nngwe eo re e futang ho tswa nakong e fetileng mme re batlang ho e boloka bakeng sa bokamoso.

blocks.text: **Lefa la setso** ke dintho tseo re di fumanang ho batho ba phetseng pele ho rona. E ka ba dintho tseo re ka di amang, jwalo ka meaho ya kgale le disebediswa, le dintho tseo re ke keng ra di ama, jwalo ka dipina, dipale, dipuo le dirisepe. Lefa la setso le re thusa ho tseba hore re bo mang le hore re tswa kae.

items: **Lefa la tlhaho** - dithaba, mahaha, dinoka le diphoofolo tse khethehileng.
**Lefa la setso** - meaho, diemahale, botaki le dintho tsa kgale.
**Lefa le phelang** - dipuo, mmino, ditantshi, dijo le mekete.

media.alt: Ditshwantsho tse tharo tse bonolo: thaba, mohaho wa kgale le moropa, di bontshang mefuta e meraro ya lefa la setso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fana ka mehlala e utlwahalang bakeng sa mofuta o mong le o mong e le hore baithuti ba Kereiti ya 5 ba kgone ho e nahana: tlhaho (Table Mountain), setso (Union Buildings), le phelang (ho bina isicathamiya, braai ya lelapa, ho pheta dipale tsa setso). Hatisa hore lefa le phelang le phela ka batho, eseng ka mohaho. Mema baithuti ho bolela ntho e le nngwe ya lefa la setso ho tswa malapeng a bona.

slides.eyebrow: Dibaka tseo lefatshe lohle le di sireletsang
slides.title: Dibaka tsa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe tsa Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: Dibaka tse ding tsa rona di khethehile hoo lefatshe lohle le thusang ho di hlokomela.

blocks.text: **Sebaka sa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe** ke sebaka se kgethilweng ke mokgatlo o bitswang **UNESCO** hobane se bohlokwa ho batho bohle lefatsheng, eseng naha e le nngwe feela. Afrika Borwa e na le dibaka tse ka bang **leshome** tsa mofuta ona, di hasane diprovenseng. Tseleng ya rona re tla etela tse ding tsa tsona.

items: Tse ding di kgethilwe ka lebaka la tlhaho, jwalo ka dithaba tsa Kapa le Drakensberg.
Tse ding di kgethilwe ka lebaka la histori, jwalo ka Mapungubwe le Robben Island.
Ho ba lenaneng lena ho bolela hore sebaka se sireleditswe bakeng sa bana ba bokamoso.

media.alt: Katiba e chitja e nang le lefatshe ka hare, jwalo ka letshwao la Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Boloka tlhaloso e le bonolo: UNESCO ke sehlopha sa Machaba a Kopaneng se etsang lenane le khethehileng la dibaka tsa bohlokwa ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng. Ha ho hlokahale hore baithuti ba tsebe palo e nepahetseng - taba ke hore Afrika Borwa e ruile ka dibaka tse jwalo. [SME] Ka kopo netefatsa palo ya hajwale ya dibaka tsa UNESCO tsa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe tsa Afrika Borwa (e ne e le leshome ka 2023) pele thuto e phatlalatswa.

slides.title: Setopo se le seng sa lefa la setso provenseng e nngwe le e nngwe
slides.lead: Diprovense tse robong, dibaka tse robong tse tummeng tseo re di etelang tseleng ya rona.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - mahaha a nang le mesapo ya batho ya kgale haholo.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - mmuso wa pele wa Afrika Borwa le tshukudu ya kgauta.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bophirimela
blocks.text: Robben Island - teronko moo Nelson Mandela a neng a tshwerwe teng.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Drakensberg - ditshwantsho tse dikete tsa MaSan di takilwe majweng.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bochabela
blocks.text: Qunu le Mthatha - dibaka tsa bongwaneng ba Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Kapa Leboya
blocks.text: Lefa la MaSan le ho ngola ha kgale majweng lehwatateng le omileng la Karoo.

blocks.heading: Foreisetata
blocks.text: Metse ya Basotho le Vredefort Dome e haufi.

blocks.heading: Leboya Bophirimela
blocks.text: Taung, moo lehata la kgale la ngwana le fumanweng teng.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa tsa Barberton - tse ding tsa majwe a kgale ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng.

slides.notes: Sena ke slaete ya kakaretso. Bala provense e nngwe le e nngwe le setopo sa yona ka lentswe le phahameng, mme o supe hoo e ka bang sebakeng seo e leng teng mmapeng o iqapetsweng (kapa mmapa wa leboteng haeba o na le wona). Bolella baithuti hore dislaete tse latelang di tla lebisa hloohong ho tse mmalwa tsa tsena. O ka botsa moithuti e mong le e mong ho kgetha setopo seo a batlang ho se etela ka ho fetisisa mme a bolele hore ke hobaneng. [SME] Netefatsa hore ho kopanya provense le sebaka ho loketse tlelase ya hao; provense e nngwe le e nngwe e na le dibaka tse ngata tsa lefa la setso mme mesuwe ba ka kgetha mehlala ya lehae.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind (Seteng sa Moloko wa Batho)
slides.lead: Sehlopha sa mahaha haufi le Johannesburg moo bo-ramahlale ba fumaneng mesapo e meng ya kgale ka ho fetisisa ya lelapa la batho lefatsheng.

blocks.text: Mahaheng a **Sterkfontein** bo-ramahlale ba epolotse **mesapo e fetohileng majwe (dibopeho tsa kgale, fossils)** - masapo a fetohileng lejwe - a batho ba pele ba neng ba phela dimilione tsa dilemo tse fetileng. Dintho tse tummeng tse fumanweng di kenyeletsa lehata le bitswang 'Mrs Ples' le lesapo le batlang le felletse le bitswang 'Little Foot'. Ke ka lebaka lena sebaka sena se bitswang *Cradle of Humankind*.

items: Seteng ke moo lesea le robalang teng - kahoo sena se jwalo ka sebaka sa tswalo ya batho.
Ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe hobane se pheta pale ya batho bohle.
O ka etela mahaha le musiamo le kajeno.

media.alt: Karolo e sehilweng ya lehaha ka tlasa lefatshe le nang le lehata la lesapo le fetohileng lejwe ka hare.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa 'lesapo le fetohileng lejwe' ka hlakileng: masapo a butle butle a fetohileng lejwe nako e telele haholo. Little Foot le Mrs Ples di etsa hore mahlale a bonahale a le nnete ho baithuti. Boloka kgopolo ya nako e telele e le bonolo - 'nako e telele haholo e fetileng, e telele ho feta kamoo re ka nahanang.' Kopanya morao le karete ya slaete ya 4. [SME] Ditsatsi di nolofaditswe ka boomo; netefatsa dipalo life kapa life tseo mosuwe a kgethang ho di bolela ka lentswe.

slides.title: Mmuso wa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Kgale, holima thaba e maotwana a bataletseng leboya haholo, ho ne ho eme motse-moholo wa mmuso wa pele wa Afrika Borwa.

blocks.text: Hoo e ka bang dilemo tse 700 ho isa ho tse 800 tse fetileng, **Mapungubwe** e ne e le mmuso o phethehileng moo batho ba neng ba lema, ba ruile dikgomo mme ba rekisa kgauta le meno a ditlou le dinaha tse hole. Morena o ne a dula holima thaba e khethehileng. Hamorao baepolli ba dintho tsa kgale (archaeologists) ba fumana dintho tse ntle tsa kgauta moo, ho kenyeletsa **tshukudu e nyane ya kgauta**.

items: E bontsha hore mebuso e meholo ya Afrika e ne e le teng mona pele ho Maeuropa a fihla.
Tshukudu ya kgauta jwale ke letshwao le tummeng la histori ya Afrika Borwa.
Mapungubwe ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe moeding le Zimbabwe le Botswana.

media.alt: Thaba e maotwana a bataletseng e nang le sebopeho se senyane sa tshukudu ya kgauta ka pele ho yona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Slaete ena e lokisa tumelo e fosahetseng e atileng ka ho bontsha mmuso wa Afrika o matla, o ruileng o neng o atlehile nako e telele pele ho mehla ya bokolone. Hatisa kgwebo (kgauta le meno a ditlou di tsamaya hole ka lewatle) le tshukudu ya kgauta e le letlotlo. Baithuti ba Kereiti ya 6 ba ithuta ka Mapungubwe ka botlalo hamorao, kahoo o jala peo. Boloka ditsatsi di potolohilwe ('hoo e ka bang dilemo tse 700-800 tse fetileng').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Sehlekehleke se senyane lewatleng haufi le Cape Town se ileng sa fetoha teronko e tummeng - le letshwao la tokoloho.

blocks.text: Ka dilemo tse ngata **Robben Island** e ne e le teronko. Nakong ya kgethollo (apartheid), baetapele ba neng ba lwanela ditokelo tse lekanang ba ne ba kwallwa mona, hole le malapa a bona. **Nelson Mandela** o qetile dilemo tse ngata seleng se senyane sehlekehlekeng pele a lokollwa mme hamorao a ba mopresidente wa pele wa Afrika Borwa a kgethilweng ka demokrasi.

items: Kajeno ke musiamo o rutang baeti ka ntwa ya tokoloho.
Ba bang ba batataisi ke batshwaruwa ba mehleng ba arolelanang dipale tsa bona.
E re hopotsa ho ananela tokoloho le ditokelo tseo re nang le tsona kajeno.

media.alt: Sehlekehleke se senyane se nang le lebone la leoatle lewatleng, le Table Mountain hole.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tshwara kgethollo (apartheid) ka hloko le ka bonolo bakeng sa Kereiti ya 5: batho ba bang ba ne ba tshwarwa ka ho se lokang ka lebaka la mmala wa letlalo la bona, mme batho ba sebete ba sebeditse ho fetola seo. Hlalosa Robben Island e le sebaka sa masisapelo le tshepo. Kopanya le Letsatsi la Tokoloho / Nelson Mandela haeba baithuti ba mo tseba. Qoba dintlha tse tshabehang; tsepamisa maikutlo sebeteng le boleng ba tokoloho.

slides.title: Ditshwantsho tsa Majwe tsa Drakensberg
slides.lead: Hodimo dithabeng tsa Drakensberg ho na le ditshwantsho tse dikete tse takilweng ke batho ba MaSan kgale.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ke mokgahlelo o phahameng ka ho fetisisa wa dithaba tsa Afrika Borwa. Mahaha a yona le marulelo a majwe di na le ditshwantsho tse dikete tse **takilweng majweng** ke **MaSan** ba tsomang le ba bokellang. Ba ne ba taka batho, diphofu (eland) le ditumelo tsa bona ba sebedisa mebala ya tlhaho e tswang majweng, dimeleng le diphoofolong.

items: Lebitso uKhahlamba le bolela 'lesakana la marumo' ka isiZulu.
Ditshwantsho di na le dilemo tse makgolo esita le tse dikete.
Ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe ka lebaka la tlhaho ya sona le botaki ba sona ba kgale.

media.alt: Lebota la lehaha le nang le ditshwantsho tsa majwe tsa MaSan tsa phofu le motho ya mathang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Kenya MaSan e le batho ba pele ba Afrika Borwa le baetsi ba botaki ba nang le tsebo le bapheti ba dipale. Hlalosa kamoo mmala o neng o etswa ka dintho tsa tlhaho (ochre, mashala, matswai a dimela, mafura a diphoofolo). Phofu (eland) e ne e le phoofolo ya bohlokwa haholo ditumelong tsa MaSan. Tshwara lefa la MaSan ka tlhompho - ditshwantsho tsena ke tse halalelang ho ditjhaba tsa ditloholo. Kopanya le ho ngola majweng ha Kapa Leboya slaeteng e latelang.

slides.title: Ho pholletsa le Karoo le Foreisetata
slides.lead: Ditopo tse ding tse tharo tseleng ya rona - Kapa Bochabela, Kapa Leboya le Foreisetata.

blocks.heading: Kapa Bochabela - Qunu
blocks.text: Meboto e metala moo Nelson Mandela a hodileng teng. Musiamo o Mthatha o pheta pale ya bophelo ba hae.

blocks.heading: Kapa Leboya - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Thaba e koahetsweng ke ho ngola ha kgale majweng, e hlokometsweng ke ditjhaba tsa MaSan le Makhoe.

blocks.heading: Foreisetata - Motse wa Basotho
blocks.text: Musiamo o phelang moo o ka bonang matlo a setso a Basotho a nang le mabota a takilweng ka botle.

media.alt: Diponahalo tse tharo tse nyane: meboto e mengata, lejwe le ngotsweng, le rondavel e takilweng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ditopo tsena tse tharo di atolosa tsela ho diprovense tse ding le mefuta e meng ya lefa la setso: sebaka sa tswalo sa motho (Kapa Bochabela), botaki ba kgale (ho ngola majweng ha Kapa Leboya, ho ngotsweng majweng ho e-na le ho takwa), le lefa le phelang motseng o sebetsang (Foreisetata). Hlalosa phapang pakeng tsa ditshwantsho tse takilweng majweng (KZN) le ho ngola majweng (Kapa Leboya). [SME] Fetola ka dibaka tsa lehae tsa Kapa Bochabela kapa Foreisetata haeba di loketse baithuti ba hao hantle.

slides.title: Majwe a kgale le ngwana wa kgale
slides.lead: Ditopo tsa rona tse pedi tsa ho qetela tsa provense di ya Leboya Bophirimela le Mpumalanga.

blocks.heading: Leboya Bophirimela - Taung
blocks.text: Ka 1924 lehata la lesapo le fetohileng lejwe la ngwana wa kgale, 'Taung Child', le fumanwe mona. Le thusitse lefatshe ho ithuta hore batho ba qadile Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa di na le tse ding tsa majwe a kgale ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng - hoo e ka bang dimilione tse 3 500 tsa dilemo - jwale ke Sebaka sa Lefa la Setso la Lefatshe.

blocks.heading: Bonase - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park le Constitution Hill ka leboya di hopola ntwa ya ditokelo tsa botho le demokrasi.

media.alt: Lehata le lenyane le fetohileng lejwe pela dithaba tsa kgale tse nang le dikarolo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung e kopanya morao le sehlooho sa Cradle of Humankind - Afrika Borwa e bohareng ba pale ya tshimoloho ya batho. Barberton e bontsha lefa la tlhaho la mofuta o mong: majwe a kgale haholo. Karete ya bonase e o dumella ho bua ka dibaka tsa demokrasi tsa Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Netefatsa selemo sa ho fumanwa ha Taung Child (1924) le dilemo tse potolohilweng tsa majwe (hoo e ka bang dimilione tse 3 500 tsa dilemo) haeba o di bua ka lentswe.

slides.eyebrow: Lefa leo o ka le utlwang, o le latswang le ho le tantsha
slides.title: Lefa le phelang le Letsatsi la Lefa la Setso
slides.lead: Hase lefa lohle le dulang le sa tsamaye ka hare ho musiamo - le leng la lona le phela dinthong tseo re di etsang letsatsi le leng le le leng.

blocks.text: **Lefa le phelang** le fetiswa ho tswa ho bo-nkgono le bo-ntatemoholo ho ya ho batswadi ho isa ho bana. Le kenyeletsa **dipuo tsa rona tsa semmuso tse 11**, dipina le ditantshi tsa rona, dipale tsa rona, diaparo tsa rona le dijo tseo re di ratang. Selemo se seng le se seng ka la **24 Loetse** Afrika Borwa e keteka **Letsatsi la Lefa la Setso**, ha re hlompha ditso tsohle tsa rona tse fapaneng.

items: Mmino le ditantshi jwalo ka isicathamiya, ho tantsha ka dibutu (gumboot) le amapiano.
Dijo tse jwalo ka papa, bunny chow, koeksister, umngqusho le chakalaka.
Dipale, dithoko (izibongo) le dipapadi tse arolelanwang pakeng tsa malapa.

media.alt: Dinoto tsa mmino, moropa le poleiti ya dijo di emelang lefa le phelang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Etsa hore ena e be slaete e nang le tshebedisano ka ho fetisisa. Kopa baithuti ho arolelana pina, sejo kapa pale ho tswa malapeng a bona. Hatisa hore lefa le phelang ke la bohle mme le dula le fetoha - amapiano ke lefa le letjha le etswang hona jwale. Hlalosa Letsatsi la Lefa la Setso ka bonolo: phomolo ya setjhaba ya ho keteka ditso tsohle tsa rona hammoho. Matlafatsa tlhompho bakeng sa diphapang.

slides.title: Ho hlokomela lefa la rona la setso
slides.lead: Lefa la setso ke la rona kaofela, kahoo rona kaofela re tlameha ho thusa ho le sireletsa.

blocks.text: Haeba meaho ya kgale e wa, ditshwantsho tsa majwe di ngwapuwa, kapa dipale ha di ke di boele di phetwe, lefa leo le a lahleha ka ho sa feleng. Ke ka lebaka lena re nang le **dimusiamo**, **diemahale** le melao e sireletsang dibaka tse khethehileng. Empa batho ba tlwaelehileng le bona ba a thusa - ka ho etela, ho ithuta le ho fetisa seo ba se tsebang.

items: O se ke wa ama kapa wa senya botaki ba majwe kapa dintho tsa kgale.
Etela dimusiamo le dibaka tsa lefa la setso ho ithuta dipale tsa tsona.
Mamela baholo mme o fetisetse dipale tsa bona ho ba bang.

media.alt: Matsoho a mabedi a tshwereng ka bonolo mohaho o monyane le sefate, a bontshang ho hlokomela lefa la setso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlisa thuto ho 'kahoo ho jwang' ya yona - lefa la setso le a senyeha mme le ka lahleha. Kopanya dikeletso tse tharo le boitshwaro ba nnete lekgetlong la sekolo. Matlafatsa tlhompho bakeng sa dibaka tse halalelang jwalo ka botaki ba majwe ba MaSan. O ka botsa baithuti ho bolela ntho e le nngwe eo ba tla e etsa ho sireletsa lefa la setso. Sena se lokisetsa dipotso tsa tlhahlobo.

slides.eyebrow: Qetello ya tsela - a re ke re hlahlobe
slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona tseleng
slides.lead: Re tsamaile ho pholletsa le diprovense tsohle tse robong mme ra kopana le lefa la tlhaho, la setso le le phelang.

blocks.text: Ho tloha mahaheng a **Cradle of Humankind** ho ya mmusong wa **Mapungubwe**, teronko ya **Robben Island** le dithaba tse takilweng tsa **Drakensberg**, lefa la setso la Afrika Borwa le pheta pale ya batho bohle ba yona. Lefa la setso ke la bohle, mme bohle ba ka thusa ho le sireletsa.

blocks.question: Bolela dibaka tse tharo tse fapaneng tsa lefa la setso mme o bolele hore e nngwe le e nngwe e provenseng efe.
Hlalosa phapang pakeng tsa lefa la tlhaho, lefa la setso le lefa le phelang. Fana ka mohlala o le mong wa e nngwe le e nngwe.
Hobaneng ho le bohlokwa ho hlokomela lefa la rona la setso? Fana ka mabaka a mabedi.

slides.notes: Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsweng kapa puisano ya tlelase. Potso ya 1 e hlahloba ho hopola dibaka le diprovense; potso ya 2 e hlahloba kgopolo ya bohlokwa ya mefuta e meraro ya lefa la setso; potso ya 3 e hlahloba kutlwisiso ya hore ke hobaneng lefa la setso le le bohlokwa. Kabo ya matshwao e latela setaele sa CAPS sa Kgato e Bohareng. Qetella ka ho hopotsa baithuti hore le bona ke karolo ya lefa le phelang la Afrika Borwa.
